welcome.title: Hi {name} 👋, welcome to the fun side! 🎉
welcome.bodyPrefix: As a thank you for signing up,
welcome.bodyHighlight: you’ve earned {points} points to get started.
welcome.bodySuffix: This guided tour will introduce the key features and help you make the most of your account.

skipModal.title: Skip Guided Tour?
skipModal.body: Feel free to explore at your own pace. When you’re ready, the guided tour is available anytime under “Getting Started” in your account dropdown.

step1.title: Your Profile at a Glance
step1.body: Everything in one place: track loyalty points and coupons, view orders, write reviews, and request quotes from your profile.

step2.title: Explore Our Products 🧐
step2.body: Explore all our products in one place. Use the product links in the header to quickly find the perfect stickers for your needs.

step3.title: Easy Product Search 🔎
step3.body: Need help finding something? Use the search icon in the header, the banner search bar, or keyboard shortcuts to locate products quickly.

step4.title: You’re ready to go! 🙌
step4.body: For helpful tips and tutorials, check out the “Getting Started” guide in your account dropdown.
